metadata.title: MindsLeap | AI Transformation Accelerator for Global Success
metadata.description: MindsLeap helps entrepreneurs and organizations achieve AI transformation for global success. Through our AI Club, Unicorn Incubation, Executive Training, and Global Study Tours.

hero.slide2Subtitle: Empowering global growth, accelerating unicorn success.
hero.slide3Subtitle: Crafting AI strategy and delivering real AI projects.

hero.tagline: Upgrade AI Mindsets for Global Success
hero.subtitle: The AI Transformation Accelerator Bridging Chinese Enterprises with Global AI Innovation
hero.description: Through community, content, incubation, and study tours, we help entrepreneurs embrace AI with confidence and transform anxiety into action.

valueProp.title: MindsLeap: Joyful Transformation
valueProp.paragraph1: Traditional entrepreneurs face an "anxiety gap" in the AI era—knowing AI matters but unable to find a clear path. Tech entrepreneurs are busy developing AI and robotics applications but lack real customers and scenarios.
valueProp.paragraph2: MindsLeap partners with renowned Silicon Valley incubator Founders Space to build an entrepreneur ecosystem connecting traditional and emerging industries, domestic and international capital, and the Silicon Valley tech community—contributing to China's industrial AI transformation and global expansion. We believe this journey should be joyful. Join us and "Leap" together.
valueProp.stat1Label: Global Partner of Founders Space, the renowned Silicon Valley incubator
valueProp.quote: Upgrade AI Mindsets for Global Success. Our mission is to accompany traditional enterprises in their AI transformation and help technology companies grow faster.
valueProp.hoffmanQuote: Founders Space and MindsLeap are coming together to help entrepreneurs and businesses transform with AI.
valueProp.hoffmanRole: Founder and Chairman of Founders Space

about.title: About MindsLeap
about.missionText: Accompany Chinese traditional enterprises in AI transformation, and help Chinese tech companies grow faster
about.storyText: MindsLeap is dedicated to building a global ecosystem network for the AI era, connecting traditional entrepreneurs, AI/robotics tech founders, investors, and Silicon Valley entrepreneurs across four core pillars.
about.naming: "Minds" represents cognition and thinking, "Leap" represents breakthrough and transformation. MindsLeap: Making AI transformation not painful, but a joyful journey of cognitive upgrade.
about.lincolnBio: Former COO of Emeritus China (a $3.2B global edtech unicorn ranked #1), VP of Marketing at Viking Cruises China. Rich in AI entrepreneurship circles and Silicon Valley resources.
about.hoffmanBio: Known as the Silicon Valley VC Godfather, he has mentored and incubated hundreds of startups. Provides AI strategy consulting for Qualcomm, Huawei, Alibaba, Intel, Disney, Volkswagen, PwC and more.
about.partnershipText: MindsLeap is a global partner of Founders Space, a global venture platform with strategic partners across 22 countries. Founders Space helps startups, governments, and enterprises leverage AI for innovation and growth.
